notableEvents.label: Gunnar Henderson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gunnar Henderson grounds into a double play, shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Ben Rice. Taylor Ward out at 2nd. Gunnar Henderson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Leody Taveras reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Leody Taveras reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Anthony Volpe.

notableEvents.label: Aaron Judge GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge grounds into a double play, third baseman Weston Wilson to second baseman Blaze Alexander to first baseman Pete Alonso. Trent Grisham out at 2nd. Aaron Judge out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Blaze Alexander singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Max Fried. Blaze Alexander to 2nd. Blaze Alexander advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Max Fried.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Leody Taveras reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Anthony Volpe.
